Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes social inclusion by being explicitly co-ed ('[男女合班]'), ensuring participation irrespective of sex, which supports Target 10.2.

Life on Land.reason: The course promotes the sustainable use of terrestrial and mountain ecosystems ('環山健走', '登山步道') for recreation and well-being, aligning with Targets 15.1 and 15.4.
